title: Figures for Manuscript "Dissecting newly transcribed and old RNA using GRAND-SLAM"
author: Erhard, Florian
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This contains a makefile together with some R scripts to generate all figures for the Manuscript "Dissecting newly transcribed and old RNA using GRAND-SLAM". Some standard R packages (like ggplot2, data.table, etc.) are needed.
steps_raw: This contains a makefile together with some R scripts to generate all figures for the Manuscript "Dissecting newly transcribed and old RNA using GRAND-SLAM". Some standard R packages (like ggplot2, data.table, etc.) are needed.
